name: John F. Kennedy
title: John F. Kennedy, taken 11/22/63 a split second before being assassinated, pronounced dead thirty minutes later, 46
description: John F. Kennedy, taken 11/22/63 a split second before being assassinated, pronounced dead thirty minutes later, 46
bio: John F. Kennedy was the 35th President of the United States. His presidency, though brief, was marked by the Cuban Missile Crisis, the Space Race, and the early stages of the Civil Rights movement.
